headline: International Paper’s New Mississippi Plant And What It Means For Undervaluation
summary: International Paper (NYSE:IP) plans to build a new sustainable packaging facility in Rankin County, Mississippi. The project focuses on modern packaging capabilities and is positioned as an expansion of the company’s operations footprint. The announcement adds a new element to International Paper’s ongoing efforts around packaging and resource efficiency. For investors watching NYSE:IP at a share price of $36.5, this move comes after a mixed performance profile, with the stock up 16.3% over...
